name: Cestra
description: Compact and deadly, the Cestra discharges bolts of energy at an increasingly rapid rate.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Compact and deadly, the Cestra discharges bolts of energy at an increasingly rapid rate.

components.name: Gallium
components.description:
Soft metal used in microelectronics and energy weapons.

Location: Mars and Uranus

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Neurodes
components.description:
Biotech sensor organ harvested from Infested entities.

Location: Earth, Lua, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Update 29
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error related to Revenant’s Danse Macabre and the Dual Cestra.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Hotfix 28.3.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when firing the Cestra.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Cestra’s clip ejecting in the wrong directions when reloading. Also tweaked the reload animation timing so that you can see the arm rotating instead of looking like it pops.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.5
patchlogs.changes:
Cestra 60 to 30
Dual Cestra 100 to 60
Secura Dual Cestra 100 to 60

patchlogs.name: The War Within: Update 19.4 + 19.4.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the flashlight on the Twin Grakatas & Dual Cestra

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed weapon skins not properly attaching to the Cestra and Dual Cestras.
Fixed the Cestra’s barrel not properly sitting in the correct position after a reload.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.8.1 + 16.8.2
patchlogs.changes: Shock Camo now works on the Secura Dual Cestras.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.5 + 16.4.5.1 + 16.4.5.2
patchlogs.changes: ·         Reduced the damage of all Cestra weapons in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.4.3 + Credit Reimbursement #2
patchlogs.changes: Made various audio adjustments to the Cestra and Dual Cestra.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.4
patchlogs.changes: Increase the visual effect of the Secura Dual Cestra’s shots.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed issue where the Dual Cestra project can be started before you ever start the Fieldron research. Every other item in the energy lab has prior requirements except for Dual Cestras.

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes: Limited the max instances of Cestra fire sound effects.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.3.0: Pack Hunters
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue with Cestra's barrel disappearing if a reload animation is interrupted.
